title: CFTR / elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the rs186089140 CT genotype (one copy of the CFTR S737F variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor or elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information indicate use of ivacaftor or elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of S737F.
